thirdPartySoftwareSecurity.providerDescription: Snyk is an international developer security platform for code, open-source dependency, container, cloud, and AI application security risk.
thirdPartySoftwareSecurity.publicResult: The Snyk-hosted public report states that no vulnerabilities were found in fairpoker-app and that no known vulnerabilities were found.
thirdPartySoftwareSecurity.evidenceBoundary: Software-security and dependency-risk evidence only; fairness remains verified by Game client CID, source package CID/SHA256/sourceFingerprint, signed transcript hash-chain, and local verifier replay.
